hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; VERSION=$(grep -o 'VERSION="[^"]*"' index.html 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f2); [ -z "$VERSION" ] && exit 0; DEST="Risk-Threat-Assessment-Tool-v${VERSION}.html"; cp index.html "$DEST" && git add "$DEST" 2>/dev/null || true
